payload.planText:
Plan: Uniform 3:4 portfolio grid refactor.

Section 4 tasks:
- Refactor GalleryGrid to a uniform 3:4 responsive grid rendered from flat photos array; drop columns prop; remove forcedRatio from Photo type.
- Convert foodphotography/page.tsx to pass flat photos and drop masonry layout config; import Photo from GalleryGrid.
- Convert propertyphotography/page.tsx to pass flat photos and delete local buildColumns (incl 2752/1536 override); import Photo from GalleryGrid.
- Delete galleryColumns.ts and confirm no dangling references; build passes.
- Manual browser verification across breakpoints (2/3/4 columns) and lightbox uncropped reveal.

No docs or ADR tags included: this is an internal layout refactor of portfolio pages with no change to documented architecture, dev workflow, conventions, invariants, traps, or high-impact decisions.
